commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer-visible repair for the provider-boundary sanitizer/security concern; automation should not take over while proof and overlapping semantics remain unresolved.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a provider-boundary serialization path that can expose raw structured fields to external model providers unless it is bounded and redacted.; Review finding: [P1]... (sha=a5bc35bac491adab48ef3803c191caa7fe908007)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shared tool-result text extraction and applies it across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google/Vertex, and Mistral provider/transport conversions with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +71, Tests +420. Total +491 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the narrower provider serializer bug by source inspection: current main filters tool-result content to text blocks in provider replay paths, so structured-only non-image blocks are dropped or degraded.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer-visible repair for the provider-boundary sanitizer/security concern; automation should not take over while proof and overlapping semantics remain unresolved.

target.title: fix(llm): preserve structured tool result text across providers
target.body:
## Summary

Addresses the provider-serializer slice of #96857 by preserving structured non-image tool-result blocks as model-visible text across provider context conversion instead of dropping them and falling back to image/empty-output placeholders.

This PR intentionally does **not** claim to resolve the broader truncation, provider-failover, or persistent session-degradation paths from the canonical issue. Those remain separate proof targets unless maintainers decide this serializer slice is sufficient for closure.

## Breaking changes

None.

## Why / Motivation & user impact

Affected provider serializers previously collected only `type: "text"` tool-result blocks. Structured-only non-image blocks from MCP-style resources, JSON/status payloads, or runtime adapters could be lost before reaching the model, so the agent could see placeholder text instead of ordinary structured tool output.

## Implementation

- Adds a shared `extractToolResultText()` helper for provider payload construction.
- Preserves normal text blocks.
- Serializes structured non-image blocks as JSON text.
- Ignores image bytes for text extraction while leaving existing image payload paths intact.
- Redacts only actual data URI tokens inside structured strings.
- Preserves ordinary strings such as `metadata:ready` and prose containing `data:`.
- Applies the helper to OpenAI Chat Completions, OpenAI Responses / transport replay, Anthropic Messages / transport replay, Google / Vertex, and Mistral conversion paths.
- Restores `CHANGELOG.md`; release-owned changelog content is no longer changed by this PR.

## Review context addressed

- Restored `CHANGELOG.md`; it is not present in the current PR diff.
- Tightened data URI redaction from a broad `data:` substring rewrite to actual data URI token matching.
- Added regression coverage for ordinary structured strings containing `metadata:ready` and prose with `data:`.
- Added contributor-supplied current-head proof output below showing structured tool-result text extraction, ordinary `data:` preservation, and data URI token redaction.
- Rebased the branch onto the latest `upstream/main` before this update.
- Narrowed the PR scope from closing the full canonical issue to addressing the provider serializer slice only.

## Validation

- Local pre-check only: `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD` passed on `a5bc35bac491`.
- Local proof command on the current checkout showed:

```text
$ git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD
a5bc35bac491
$ git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD
passed
$ git diff --name-only upstream/main...HEAD | grep CHANGELOG.md
no output (CHANGELOG.md restored; it is not in this PR diff)
$ node --experimental-strip-types /tmp/pr97450-proof.mjs
structured-only output: {"type":"resource","uri":"memory://result.json","mimeType":"application/json","data":{"ok":true,"items":2}}
mixed image+structured output: {"type":"resource","status":"metadata:ready","note":"data: is ordinary prose here"}
data URI token output: {"type":"resource","preview":"thumbnail=[redacted data URI] done"}
```

- GitHub Actions state observed after pushing `a5bc35bac491`:
- Real behavior proof: COMPLETED/SUCCESS — https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/28318937996/job/83897231777
- preflight: COMPLETED/SUCCESS — https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/28318934139/job/83897223923
- security-fast: IN_PROGRESS — https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/28318934139/job/83897223919
- check-lint: QUEUED — https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/28318934139/job/83897245496
- check-test-types: QUEUED — https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/28318934139/job/83897245530
- check-shrinkwrap: QUEUED — https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/28318934139/job/83897245506
- build-artifacts: QUEUED — https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/28318934139/job/83897245430
- Scan changed paths (precise): IN_PROGRESS — https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/28318934117/job/83897219195
- Opengrep OSS: missing — not available yet

## Evidence source map

- Structured tool-result preservation: helper proof output above plus focused regression tests in `src/llm/providers/tool-result-text.test.ts` and provider/transport tests.
- Data URI boundary: helper proof output above plus regression coverage for ordinary `metadata:ready` / prose `data:` strings and actual data URI token redaction.
- Changelog restoration: `git diff --name-only upstream/main...HEAD | grep CHANGELOG.md` produced no output on `a5bc35bac491`.
- Latest-main basis: branch was rebased onto the latest `upstream/main` before force-with-lease push.
- CI coverage: GitHub Actions check URLs/statuses listed in Validation.

## Risk

Low/medium. This changes model-visible provider serialization for existing tool-result content. The risk is bounded by serializing only non-image structured blocks as text and keeping image handling on the existing multimodal paths. The previous broad string rewrite was narrowed so ordinary structured text containing `data:` is preserved.

## Rollback

Revert this PR to return provider serializers to their previous text-only tool-result extraction behavior. No data migration, persistent state format change, dependency change, or configuration rollback is required.

## Docs updated

No user-facing docs were changed. `CHANGELOG.md` was restored and is not part of the PR diff; release notes can be handled by the release process or squash/merge message.

## Related issue / PR

- Related to #96857. This PR addresses the provider serializer slice; it does not close out broader failover, truncation, or visible transcript paths by itself.
- Related review context: ClawSweeper review comment https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/97450#issuecomment-4825429953.

## Not tested / Limitations

- No live external provider call was made in this update.
- The broader provider-failover/session-corruption path described in #96857 is not proven by this PR and should remain tracked separately unless maintainers decide otherwise.
target.author: snowzlmbot

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
